creator: basil@vpm.net.ua
text:
diff -u ?



diff -u /usr/ports/sysutils/ldap-account-manager/ /root/ldap-account-manager/
diff -u /usr/ports/sysutils/ldap-account-manager/Makefile /root/ldap-account-manager/Makefile
--- /usr/ports/sysutils/ldap-account-manager/Makefile	2015-09-25 20:11:10.000000000 +0300
+++ /root/ldap-account-manager/Makefile	2015-12-15 20:34:13.964158857 +0200
@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD: head/sysutils/ldap-account-manager/Makefile 397842 2015-09-25 17:11:10Z rm $
 
 PORTNAME=	ldap-account-manager
-PORTVERSION=	5.1
+PORTVERSION=	5.2
 CATEGORIES=	sysutils www
 MASTER_SITES=	SF/${SHORTNAME}/LAM/${PORTVERSION}
 
diff -u /usr/ports/sysutils/ldap-account-manager/distinfo /root/ldap-account-manager/distinfo
--- /usr/ports/sysutils/ldap-account-manager/distinfo	2015-09-25 20:11:10.000000000 +0300
+++ /root/ldap-account-manager/distinfo	2015-12-15 20:34:22.817156025 +0200
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (ldap-account-manager-5.1.tar.bz2) = 6a7d1d8caa10fad4c579d30c7d8616fcdb053d5c784d23bb07ce9f22962e92ef
-SIZE (ldap-account-manager-5.1.tar.bz2) = 13923166
+SHA256 (ldap-account-manager-5.2.tar.bz2) = 1d87153e34ed8a6f33b91761af04ae61df6b45e26cb773bee44d80896eca43d3
+SIZE (ldap-account-manager-5.2.tar.bz2) = 14047912
